hookSpecificOutput.additionalContext: DEFAULT TASK (offer, ask first): At the start of this session, before doing other work, OFFER to run today's stock scan and ASK the user to confirm. Do NOT run it automatically. Briefly tell them the daily scan is available and ask something like: 'Run today's stock scan? (yes/no)'. Only if the user confirms (yes / run it / go ahead / etc.) should you run it; if they decline or ask for something else, skip the scan and handle their request instead. When the user does confirm: run it in the background and monitor it to completion. From this repo's root, the scan lives at Stock_OneClick/backend/scan_stocks.py and must be run from that backend dir (it imports the local xunlong module). Command: cd Stock_OneClick/backend && STOCK_ONECLICK_NO_OPEN=1 ../../vcp_env/bin/python scan_stocks.py  (Takes a few minutes; downloads market data via yfinance. STOCK_ONECLICK_NO_OPEN=1 skips the macOS auto-open of the result Excel.) When it finishes, summarize the market regime, the buy signals, and the output files it wrote: scan_result_latest.xlsx, tv_daily_signals/tv_today_<date>.txt, and tv_buy_signals/tv_buy_today_<date>.txt (notes version too).
